notes:
## 且慢主理人看板 v2.6.0

- release: v2.6.0 — 整体布局优化与 macOS 特效适配，支持双击窗口最大化
- fix: remove stray closing brace in toggleMainWindowZoom
- LUC-206: optimize layout density and responsive adaptation
- LUC-207: 收敛主窗口布局与设计系统
- LUC-204: macOS 主窗口标题栏与双击最大化行为补齐
- feat(LUC-208): adapt macOS material effects and window appearance
- LUC-209: 完善双击窗口最大化与回归验证
- LUC-205: 统一 macOS 现代材质与视觉层级设计系统
- release: update v2.5.6
- release: v2.5.6 — 修复推送通知后 createMainWindow() 后台线程崩溃
- LUC-196: 添加 .receive(on: DispatchQueue.main) 修复推送通知 Combine 订阅后台线程崩溃
- release: update v2.5.5
- release: update latest feed to v2.5.5
- release: v2.5.5
- feat: set activationPolicy in applicationDidFinishLaunching
- release: update v2.5.4
- fix: improve light mode contrast
- release: update v2.5.3
